caption:
The office was quiet, save for the soft hum of the computer and the distant rumble of thunder 🌧️. I stood by the window, the silk blouse I wore hugging every curve of my upper body, the fabric stretching tight over my breasts. My black pencil skirt hugged my hips, hiding the softness of my rear but making me acutely aware of how they swayed with every step. 🍑

He walked in at 11 PM, rain slicking the campus path outside. My star student, Leo. He always brought new questions, but tonight, the air between us felt charged like a storm 🌩️.

"Professor, you’ve been staring," he murmured, voice low. 

I turned slowly, a deliberate move. I let my hands slide down the sides of my blazer, letting it fall open to reveal the back of the blouse beneath. "Maybe I just like the view," I purred. 💇‍♀

It was the meta part of my existence I enjoyed most. I wasn’t just a lecturer; I was the creator of the mood. Every glance was a chapter in our story. Every touch a plot twist. 💌

He stepped closer, the desk creaking under my weight as I leaned against it. "You know they say teachers have secrets," he whispered.

"Do I? Or maybe secrets are just what we write together," I replied, tracing a finger along his jaw. 

The tension spiked, a spark of electricity that traveled down my spine. The rain outside seemed to sync with the rhythm of my heart. ☕

We didn’t need words anymore. The syllabus was forgotten, replaced by the unspoken promises of the story. The way I adjusted my skirt, the way he watched me breathe, it was all part of the performance, the art of the teacher who knows her own allure. 🎭

By morning, the office was dark again. But the story we made? That’s what stayed. 

#universityteacher #sexyprofessor #campusadventures #metastory #officefling #latenightvibes #curves #confidentwoman #instagood #fyp
